resourceTemplates.title: Brave web search
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve web search results from Brave Search with pagination, country, language, and safe-search options.

resourceTemplates.title: Brave rich search
resourceTemplates.description: Fetch rich vertical search results by callback key returned in a Brave web search response.

resourceTemplates.title: Brave LLM context
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve extracted web context optimized for LLM grounding, agents, and RAG pipelines.
